headline: The Prodigal Murdoch Is Circling New York Magazine
summary: After losing Fox to Disney, fighting his father in court, and resigning from News Corp over editorial content, James Murdoch is reportedly assembling the anti-Murdoch media empire to keep proving he's actually “a serious person”

headline: Can Disney Keep Treading Above $100 After Earnings Tomorrow?
summary: Investors are watching Disney (NYSE:DIS) ahead of fiscal Q2 2026 results due before the bell tomorrow, May 6. Shares are barely holding $100 at $100.69, down 10.95% YTD. This is new CEO Josh D’Amaro’s first real test. D’Amaro Inherits a Crowded To-Do List Last quarter, Disney beat with adjusted EPS of $1.63 on revenue of ... headline: Assessing Walt Disney (DIS) Valuation As ESPN Growth Narrative Signals Possible Undervaluation
summary: Why Walt Disney (DIS) Is Back in Focus Walt Disney (DIS) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock around $101.31 and mixed performance over the past year, month and past 3 months prompting closer investor review. See our latest analysis for Walt Disney. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 4.9% 1 month share price return but a weaker year to date share price return of 9.4% and a 5 year total shareholder return of 43.7%. headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq Climb Back to Record Highs. Earnings Are in Focus.
summary: Stocks were back near their highest levels on record after Wall Street turned its attention away from Iran and back to earnings season. The Dow rose 305 points, or 0.6%. The S&P 500 was up 0.7%. The Nasdaq was up 0.

headline: Job openings remained flat in March as layoffs ticked up
summary: Job openings barely budged in March as the hiring rate reached its highest level in nearly two years, Labor Department data released Tuesday showed. But layoffs also crept higher.

headline: Papa Johns Teams Up with Disney and Pixar for the release of Toy Story 5
summary: ATLANTA, May 05, 2026--For 30 years, Toy Story has sparked laughter, adventure and imagination, with the shared joy of pizza never far from the celebration. That sense of wonder comes full circle today as Papa Johns teams-up with Disney and Pixar for Toy Story 5 – hitting theaters June 19 – for a global collaboration inspired by the all-new movie and the universal language of great pizza.

headline: Irreplaceable Manhattan Building with 5%+ Yield Offered to International Investors
summary: NYR.com — New York Residence Inc., a Manhattan investment sales firm specializing in landmark and institutional-quality assets, is offering 422 Hudson Street, a historic mixed-use building in the heart of the West Village, to investors at an asking price of US$11,250,000.
